calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Hearing On Default Prove Up
Off Calendar Dec-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

James A. Bryant II, Esq., appearing for and with Plaintiff, Jason Kutasi,
No appearance by defaulted defendant Ekoventure, Inc. DBA ZOZI,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-10 dismissed without prejudice.
Witness: Anthony Eisenberg sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $200,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $55,397.26
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $695.95
Total Judgment in the amount of $256,093.21

Judgment signed in open court.
